topic: Investigate improvements to sk-deep-research: validate 18 v2 proposals, analyze 3 reference repos (AGR, pi-autoresearch, autoresearch-opencode) at code level, discover new improvements, produce v3 proposals with file-level change lists

focus: RQ1: Error recovery patterns at CODE level across AGR, pi-autoresearch, autoresearch-opencode
RQ2: Convergence/stopping logic evolution across pi-autoresearch, AGR, and our system
RQ3: Cross-reference 18 v2 proposals against actual source code
RQ4: Gap analysis -- features in reference repos NOT covered by 18 v2 proposals
RQ6: GitHub issues/PRs for real-world failure modes across pi-autoresearch, AGR, autoresearch-opencode, karpathy/autoresearch
RQ7: Cross-domain convergence approaches from ML training, optimization, statistical process control
RQ8: Capstone synthesis -- v2 architecture, consolidated v3 proposals, critical path, file-level change specs
RQ5 completion (behavioral impact of cross-runtime divergences) + v3 proposal validation
Final consolidation: RQ gap closure (RQ1/RQ2/RQ4/RQ6/RQ7), research-ideas triage, contradiction check, simplification
